inputs.label: Sum Assured (Death Benefit)
inputs.businessContext: The amount paid upon death of the insured.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount paid upon death of the insured.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Betrag, der beim Tod der versicherten Person ausgezahlt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant versé en cas de décès de l'assuré.

inputs.label: Annual Mortality Rate
inputs.businessContext: The probability that the insured will die within the next year.

businessContext_i18n.en: The probability that the insured will die within the next year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sigortalının önümüzdeki yıl içinde ölme olasılığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass die versicherte Person innerhalb des nächsten Jahres stirbt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité que l'assuré décède dans l'année à venir.

inputs.label: Annual Discount Rate (i)
inputs.businessContext: The interest rate used for discounting future benefits.

businessContext_i18n.en: The interest rate used for discounting future benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki faydaların iskonto edilmesinde kullanılan faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zinssatz, der zur Diskontierung zukünftiger Leistungen verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt utilisé pour actualiser les prestations futures.

inputs.label: Expense Loading
inputs.businessContext: Loading factor for expenses, as a decimal (e.g., 0.1 for 10%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Loading factor for expenses, as a decimal (e.g., 0.1 for 10%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Giderler için yükleme faktörü, ondalık olarak (ör. %10 için 0,1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zuschlagsfaktor für Kosten, als Dezimalzahl (z. B. 0,1 für 10 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de chargement pour les frais, sous forme décimale (ex. 0,1 pour 10%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
